title: KAHEIGN 3Pcs Christmas Bag Santa Sack Canvas Bag with White Drawstrings - Christmas Elk Express Delivery Bags Gift Bags Extra Large Size 70 x 50cm
features: [High quality] Made of 100% cotton canvas, soft and comfortable, strong and durable, edge reinforced sewing, not easy to break, easy to clean, can be reused for many years
[Drawstring] Each bag is equipped with a whtite drawstring strap (not black), which is easy to open and close, don't need any extra binding strap, saving time, general capacity is about 110 pounds
[Elk Pattern]3 different elk delivery style bags, can add the person's name in the blank at the bottom of the bag by use markers, thread or cloth to sew, stamp or emboss, etc
[Size] Extra large size: 50 x 70 cm, can easily wrap large gifts or hold multiple small items, the pattern is not easy to fade, suitable for hand washing and machine washing
[Applicable] Suitable for under the Christmas tree, great for store the candy, jewelries, rings, earings, presents, apple, cookies and other bigger size gifts inside
description: KAHEIGN 3Pcs Christmas Gifts Bag Santa Sack Canvas Bag Suitable for under the Christmas tree, great for store the candy, jewelries, rings, earings, presents, apple, cookies and other bigger size gifts inside. Feature: - Made of 100% cotton canvas, soft and comfortable, strong and durable, edge reinforced sewing, not easy to break. - The pattern on the bag is very clear, printed with 3 different Christmas-style elk, which is more festive. - Each bag is equipped with a white drawstring strap (not black), which is easy to open and close, saving time. - Can add the person's name in the blank at the bottom of the bag by use markers, thread or cloth to sew, stamp or emboss, etc. - Extra large size: 50 x 70 cm, can easily wrap large gifts or hold multiple small items, general capacity is about 110 pounds. Specification: Material: 100% cotton Size: 70 x 50cm Capacity: max loading 110 LB Note: Because in actual production, in order to match the color of the bag, we used white drawstring instead of black drawstring, but this does not affect the quality and use. Package included: 3 x Christmas Santa Sack Bag
